description: Milestone 10: Move Profile from bottom tab bar to a floating top-right icon that opens a sheet. Replace the Profile tab with a new Termine (Events) tab that displays calendar entries imported from an iCal feed (piragitator.de).

userStories.title: Create Event domain entity and repository protocol
userStories.description: Define the Event domain model and EventRepository protocol for calendar events from an iCal feed.
acceptanceCriteria: Event struct exists in Core/Domain/Termine/ with fields: id (String), title, startDate, endDate, location?, description?, category?, url?
Event conforms to Identifiable and Equatable
EventRepository protocol exists with fetchEvents() async throws -> [Event]
EventRepositoryError enum with loadFailed case
App builds successfully

userStories.title: Implement iCal parser and event repositories
userStories.description: Create an iCal parser to convert RFC 5545 VCALENDAR data into Event entities, plus real and fake repository implementations.
acceptanceCriteria: ICalParser parses VEVENT blocks extracting SUMMARY, DTSTART, DTEND, LOCATION, DESCRIPTION, CATEGORIES, URL, UID
Handles date formats YYYYMMDDTHHmmss and YYYYMMDD
Handles iCal escaped characters (\, -> comma, \n -> newline) and line folding
RealEventRepository fetches iCal data from URL via URLSession (no auth needed) and parses with ICalParser
iCal feed URL is configured via .xcconfig (ICAL_FEED_URL), not hardcoded
FakeEventRepository returns hardcoded sample events for previews and tests
Unit tests verify iCal parsing for valid and edge-case inputs
App builds successfully

userStories.title: Create TermineViewModel following existing patterns
userStories.description: Create the ViewModel for the Termine tab following the TodosViewModel pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: TermineViewModel exists with TermineLoadState enum (idle, loading, loaded, error)
Published properties: events, loadState
Methods: loadEvents(), refresh()
Computed properties: upcomingEvents (startDate >= now, ascending), pastEvents (startDate < now, descending)
Wired into AppContainer with both production and test initializers
App builds successfully

userStories.title: Create TermineView with inline event display
userStories.description: Create the Termine tab view showing events inline using ScrollView + LazyVStack (not List).
acceptanceCriteria: TermineView uses ScrollView + LazyVStack (no List, per project convention)
Shows sections: Kommende Termine (upcoming) and Vergangene Termine (past)
Each event row displays: title, date/time in German format, location, category, description
Supports .refreshable for pull-to-refresh
Shows loading, error, and empty states
App builds successfully

userStories.title: Move Profile to floating top-right icon with sheet presentation
userStories.description: Remove Profile from bottom tab bar. Add a floating overlay button (top-right, person.circle icon) on the TabView that presents ProfileView as a sheet.
acceptanceCriteria: Profile tab removed from bottom tab bar
Floating person.circle icon visible in top-right corner on all tabs
Tapping icon presents ProfileView as a .sheet sliding up from the bottom
ProfileView includes a close/dismiss button in the sheet context
All existing profile functionality (settings, notifications, logout) works in sheet
App builds successfully

userStories.title: Wire Termine tab into tab bar and update dependency chain
userStories.description: Replace the Profile tab with the Termine tab in MainTabView and update the full dependency injection chain.
acceptanceCriteria: Termine tab appears as tab index 4 with calendar icon and label 'Termine'
Tab order: Forum, Nachrichten, Wissen, ToDos, Termine
TermineViewModel passed through PIRATENApp -> StartupContainerView -> RootView -> MainTabView
DeepLinkRouter tab index comments updated
All existing tests pass
App builds and runs successfully
